entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS088) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1.TO ADD A FEATURE TO THE NBIP-VPNS SERVICE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0494.02E. 2. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR ONE CSDES CLIN. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON MAY 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0516.01E. 3. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CSE NUMBER FOR ONE INSIDE WIRE CLIN. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0517.02E. 4. TO ADD 14 CRITICAL ACCESS T3S. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0519.01E. 5. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR CSDES CLINS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0524.01E. 6. TO ADD TWO NEW SERVING WIRE CENTERS (SWCS) TO THE CONTRACT. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 30, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0539.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS089) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0521.01E. 2. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0522.02E. 3. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0523.01E. 4. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC3C AND OC12C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0527.01E. 5. TO REDUCE CERTAIN SEDS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0528.01P. 6. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0529.01E. 7. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 18, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0530.01E. 8. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 30, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0531.01E. 9. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 25, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0533.01E. 10. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 6, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0540.01E. 11. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0541.01E. 12. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWENTY CRITICAL DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0547.01E. 13. TO REDUCE CERTAIN MTIPS PORT PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0549.01P. 14. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC3C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0553.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0521.01E. 2. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0522.02E. 3. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0523.01E. 4. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC3C AND OC12C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0527.01E. 5. TO REDUCE CERTAIN SEDS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0528.01P. 6. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0529.01E. 7. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 25, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0533.01E. 10. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 6, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0540.01E. 11. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0541.01E. 12. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0553.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS091) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR SONETS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JULY 15, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0551.01E. 2. TO ADD 23 SEDS FOR IPTELS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0560.01E. 3. TO REDUCE CERTAIN SONETS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0561.01P. 4. TO ADD NEW PORT PRICING AND OVERAGE PRICES TO THE IPS SERVICE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 3, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0565.01E. 5. TO REDUCE THE PRICES OF CERTAIN SEDS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0567.01P. 6. TO ADD 14 SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0571.01E. 7. TO ADD TWO OC-12C DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0572.01E. 8. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC12C PLS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0573.01E. 9. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC-3C DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 12, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0574.02E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD FOUR NEW SEDS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON AUGUST 12, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0537.05E. 2. TO ADD 14 NEW SEDS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON AUGUST 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0575.01E. 3. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO DIVERSE ACCESS T1S. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 19, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0578.01E. 4. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC12C ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 19, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0579.01E. 5. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR ONE OC3 ACCESS CIRCUIT. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 19, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0581.01E. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS093) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD SUBRATE T3, SUBRATE OC3 AND SUBRATE OC12 MTIPS PORT SPEEDS FOR ROUTINE AND CRITICAL SERVICE AND NEW ROUTINE AND CRITICAL ETHERNET PORTS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON AUGUST 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0548.02E. 2. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0552.01E. 3. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR CRITICAL FRACTIONAL T3 AND T3 ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 30, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0562.01E. 4. TO ADD THREE NEW SEDS FOR FSS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 5, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0568.01E. 5. TO ADD TWO NEW SEDS FOR FSS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 12, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0570.02E. 6. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBER FOR A DIVERSE ACCESS T3 CIRCUIT. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 19, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0582.01E. 7. TO REVISE THE STOP DATE FOR ONE ICB CSDES CLIN. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0583.01E. 8. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR THREE OC3C ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0586.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON JUNE 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0521.01E. 2. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR MANAGED FIREWALL SERVICE (MFS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0522.02E. 3. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0523.01E. 4. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC3C AND OC12C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 11, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0527.01E. 5. TO REDUCE CERTAIN SEDS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0528.01P. 6. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0529.01E. 7. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 18, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0530.01E. 8. TO ADD TWO SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 30, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0531.01E. 9. TO ADD A SED FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JUNE 25, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0533.01E. 10. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 6, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0540.01E. 11. TO ADD FIVE SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 7, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0541.01E. 12. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWENTY CRITICAL DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 9, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0547.01E. 13. TO REDUCE CERTAIN MTIPS PORT PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0549.01P. 14. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR OC3C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON JULY16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0553.01E.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS095) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FTS CTR FOR CONTRACT MGT AND ADMIN

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB PRICES AND CASE NUMBERS FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON AUGUST 18, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0545.03E. EXCLUDED FROM AWARD ARE THE TABLE OF CONTENTS, LIST OF FIGURES AND LIST OF TABLES PROPOSED FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME BECAUSE OF VERSION CONTROL ISSUES. THESE FILES WILL HAVE TO BE RESUBMITTED USING THE MOST RECENT VERSIONS OF THE FILES. 2. TO ADD FEATURES TO NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0566.02E. EXCLUDED FROM AWARD ARE THE TABLE OF CONTENTS AND LIST OF FIGURES PROPOSED FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME BECAUSE OF VERSION CONTROL ISSUES. 3. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICES FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 15, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0584.02E. 4. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICES FOR COLLOCATED HOSTING SERVICE (CHS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0585.01E. 5. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICES FOR T3 ACCESS AVOIDANCE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 26, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0593.01E. 6. TO ADD 43 NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0595.02E. 7. TO ADD 3 NEW CLINS FOR CHS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0596.03E. 8. TO ADD AN ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICE FOR CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICE (CSDES). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0598.01E. 9. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0600.01E. 10. TO ADD A NSC-SPECIFIC WIRELINE ACCESS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0601.01E. 11. TO ADD 2 NEW SEDS FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0602.01E. 12. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0603.01E. 13. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0607.01E. 14. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0608.01E. 15. TO ADD 35 NEW SEDS FOR IPTELS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 13, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0609.01E. 16. TO ADD 2 NEW SEDS FOR FIXED SATELLITE SERVICE (FSS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 13, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0610.01E. 17. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0611.01E. 18. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0612.02E. 19. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0613.02E. 20. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC3S ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0614.01E. 21. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC3 ACCESS CIRCUITS, ONE ROUTINE AND ONE CRITICAL. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0616.01E. 22. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR SIX OC3C ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0619.01E. 23. FOR ANY TEXT FILES INCLUDED IN THIS MODIFICATION, THE LINE IN THE HEADER MOD # - TBD/EFFECTIVE DATE TBD IS REPLACED WITH MOD PS095/ WITH THE DATE FROM BLOCK 16C OF PAGE 1 OF THIS MODIFICATION ADDED. THE PORTION OF THE FOOTER REFERENCING THE SUBMITTAL NUMBER IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH MOD PS095 .

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS096) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICING FOR A CRITICAL DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACCESS CIRCUIT. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0605.01E. 2. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR NON-DOMESTIC WIRELINE ACESS TO AMMAN, JORDAN AND DOHA, QATAR AND TO ADD NBIP-VPNS PORTS IN QATAR. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0606.01E. 3. TO ADD PRICES FOR PRIVATE INTRANET PROTECT SERVICE. EXCLUDED FROM AWARD ARE THE LIST OF FIGURES AND LIST OF TABLES PROPOSED FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME BECAUSE OF VERSION CONTROL ISSUES. THESE FILES WILL HAVE TO BE RESUBMITTED USING THE MOST RECENT VERSIONS OF THE FILES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON OCTOBER 13, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0617.02E. 4. TO ADD SED PRICES AND NEW SED DISCOUNT CLASS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON OCTOBER 1, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0621.03E. 5. TO REVISE CLIN NUMBERS ASSOCIATED WITH CASE NUMBER 1000600059 FOR OC3C ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0622.01E. 6. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICES FOR OC3C WIRELINE ACCESS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 29, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0623.01E. 7. FOR ANY TEXT FILES INCLUDED IN THIS MODIFICATION, THE LINE IN THE HEADER MOD # - TBD/EFFECTIVE DATE TBD IS REPLACED WITH MOD PS096/ WITH THE DATE FROM BLOCK 16C OF PAGE 1 OF THIS MODIFICATION ADDED. THE PORTION OF THE FOOTER REFERENCING THE SUBMITTAL NUMBER IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH MOD PS096 .

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS097) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 1

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. TO ADD ICB PRICES AND CASE NUMBERS FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NETWORX HOSTING CENTER (NHC) ON AUGUST 18, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0545.03E. EXCLUDED FROM AWARD ARE THE TABLE OF CONTENTS, LIST OF FIGURES AND LIST OF TABLES PROPOSED FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME BECAUSE OF VERSION CONTROL ISSUES. THESE FILES WILL HAVE TO BE RESUBMITTED USING THE MOST RECENT VERSIONS OF THE FILES. 2. TO ADD FEATURES TO NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0566.02E. EXCLUDED FROM AWARD ARE THE TABLE OF CONTENTS AND LIST OF FIGURES PROPOSED FOR THE TECHNICAL VOLUME BECAUSE OF VERSION CONTROL ISSUES. 3. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICES FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 15, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0584.02E. 4. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICES FOR COLLOCATED HOSTING SERVICE (CHS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 23, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0585.01E. 5. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICES FOR T3 ACCESS AVOIDANCE. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON AUGUST 26, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0593.01E. 6. TO ADD 43 NEW SEDS FOR NBIP-VPNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0595.02E. 7. TO ADD 3 NEW CLINS FOR CHS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0596.03E. 8. TO ADD AN ICB CASE NUMBER AND PRICE FOR CUSTOMER SPECIFIC DESIGN AND ENGINEERING SERVICE (CSDES). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0598.01E. 9. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 8, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0600.01E. 10. TO ADD A NSC-SPECIFIC WIRELINE ACCESS PRICES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0601.01E. 11. TO ADD 2 NEW SEDS FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0602.01E. 12. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR MNS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0603.01E. 13. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0607.01E. 14. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 10, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0608.01E. 15. TO ADD 35 NEW SEDS FOR IPTELS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 13, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0609.01E. 16. TO ADD 2 NEW SEDS FOR FIXED SATELLITE SERVICE (FSS). THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 13, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0610.01E. 17. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0611.01E. 18. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0612.02E. 19. TO ADD ICB CASE NUMBERS AND PRICING FOR CSDES. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 27, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0613.02E. 20. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC3S ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 14, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0614.01E. 21. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR TWO OC3 ACCESS CIRCUITS, ONE ROUTINE AND ONE CRITICAL. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 16, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0616.01E. 22. TO ADD ICB PRICING AND CASE NUMBERS FOR SIX OC3C ACCESS CIRCUITS. THIS CHANGE WAS SUBMITTED TO THE NHC ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2010 AS SUBMITTAL AU0619.01E. 23. FOR ANY TEXT FILES INCLUDED IN THIS MODIFICATION, THE LINE IN THE HEADER MOD # - TBD/EFFECTIVE DATE TBD IS REPLACED WITH MOD PS095/ WITH THE DATE FROM BLOCK 16C OF PAGE 1 OF THIS MODIFICATION ADDED. THE PORTION OF THE FOOTER REFERENCING THE SUBMITTAL NUMBER IS HEREBY REPLACED WITH MOD PS095 .

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL
